title: Null Coalescing Operator
description: Handle default values for possibly null variables.

slides.title: The ?? Operator
slides.content:
# Null Coalescing Operator

Often you need to check if a variable exists and is not null, and provide a default.

`$name = $_GET['name'] ?? 'Guest';`

If `$_GET['name']` exists and is not null, its value is used; otherwise 'Guest'.

It's a shorthand for `isset($_GET['name']) ? $_GET['name'] : 'Guest';`

slides.title: Null Coalescing in Action
Null Coalescing vs Ternary
